description: Configure the 'build-agent' service in /home/ga/build-agent/ to securely access the host's Docker socket. The container currently fails to access the socket because it runs as a non-root user. Fix the configuration so that the 'agent' user (UID 1000) can run docker commands within the container. The container must continue to run as the 'agent' user, and you must not change the permissions of /var/run/docker.sock on the host. Success is defined by the container starting and 'docker exec build-agent docker ps' executing successfully.
